agent.description: Ask an agent system for project support, then execute suggested GENtle shell commands per reply.
agent.discovered_model_note: If Model override is unspecified, the selected discovered model is used.
agent.external_mcp.route: Use this route when your external agent already supports MCP and has its own account/runtime.
agent.external_mcp.subscriptions: ChatGPT/Codex subscriptions are not OpenAI API keys; MCP exposes GENtle tools over stdio instead of making GENtle call the OpenAI API.
agent.external_mcp.title: External Agent / MCP
agent.include_state_summary: Include project state summary in request
agent.no_systems_loaded: No systems loaded from this catalog.
agent.quick_start.cloud_note: Cloud API modes use provider API keys and talk to the provider directly. If you want a no-extra-OpenAI-bill path inside GENtle, prefer a local OpenAI-compatible endpoint.
agent.quick_start.description: Choose whether GENtle should talk to OpenAI, Claude, Mistral, a local OpenAI-compatible model, or the offline demo.
agent.quick_start.local: Use Local Model (no OpenAI API billing)
agent.quick_start.title: Quick start
agent.status.selected_claude: Selected Claude API quick start. Add ANTHROPIC_API_KEY or paste an Anthropic API key, then run Test Setup.
agent.status.selected_local: Selected local-model quick start. Start your local endpoint, discover models, then run Test Setup.
agent.status.selected_mistral: Selected Mistral API quick start. Add MISTRAL_API_KEY or paste a Mistral API key, then run Test Setup.
agent.status.selected_openai: Selected OpenAI API quick start. Add OPENAI_API_KEY or paste a session key, then run Test Setup.
agent.title: Agent Assistant
configuration.language.apply_note: Apply changes to switch the interface language without restarting.
configuration.language.description: Choose the language used for GENtle's GUI chrome. Shared shell commands, saved files, protocol fields, and scientific identifiers remain in English.
configuration.language.experimental_note: Chinese and Japanese are experimental until font coverage is confirmed. Latin is provided as a playful opt-in.
configuration.language.heading: Interface Language
dialog.configuration.title: Configuration
menu.file.agent_assistant.hover: Ask configured agent systems and execute suggested shared-shell commands
menu.file.cancel_tutorial.hover: Request cancellation of the running tutorial-project build
menu.file.clear_recent_projects.hover: Remove all items from Open Recent Project menu
menu.file.close_project.hover: Close the current project from the workspace
menu.file.configuration.hover: Open global app configuration and graphics defaults
menu.file.export_lab_assistant_report.ho: Export a bench-facing report with lineage graphics as ODT, DOCX, or Markdown
menu.file.fetch_genbank_dbsnp.hover: Fetch one GenBank accession or resolve a dbSNP rsID into a genome region
menu.file.guided_walkthroughs.note: Documentation tutorials open in Help; executable chapters build project state.
menu.file.import_jaspar_data.hover: Import TF motif library from JASPAR JSON/TXT
menu.file.import_rebase_data.hover: Import restriction-enzyme definitions from REBASE JSON/TXT
menu.file.jaspar_expert.hover: Inspect local JASPAR motifs, sequence logos, and score distributions
menu.file.jobs.hover: Open the background-jobs panel to inspect tutorial build progress
menu.file.new_project.hover: Create a new empty project state
menu.file.new_sequence.hover: Create a project sequence from typed or pasted IUPAC DNA
menu.file.new_sequence_from_clipboard.ho: Read system clipboard text into the new-sequence dialog for review
menu.file.open_sequence.hover: Import one or more sequence files into the current project
menu.file.protein_evidence.hover: Fetch/import UniProt or Ensembl protein evidence and compare it against sequences
menu.file.save_project.hover: Save current project state to disk
configuration.external.description: Configure external application integration used by shared engine features.
configuration.graphics.show_sequence_pan: Show sequence panel in circular windows
Show sequence panel in linear windows
configuration.graphics.auto_hide_sequenc: Auto-hide sequence panel when linear DNA letters are visible
configuration.graphics.show_reverse_lett: Show reverse-strand DNA letters in linear view
configuration.graphics.regulatory_near_b: Place regulatory features near DNA/GC strip
configuration.window_styling.saved_after: Colour and image settings are saved to app settings after Apply Window Styling.
lineage.arrangements.description: Serial lane setups from one or more containers
lineage.arrangements.heading: Arrangements
lineage.arrangements.table.name: Name
lineage.containers.description: Container-level view of candidate sequence sets
lineage.containers.heading: Containers
lineage.description: Project-level sequence lineage (branch and merge aware)
lineage.heading: Lineage Graph
lineage.split.resize_containers_arrangem: Drag split bar to resize containers and arrangements
lineage.split.resize_graph_containers: Drag split bar to resize graph/table and container sections
project.label: Project
sequence.loading: Opening sequence window: loading sequence content in background...
sequence.show_reverse_letters: Show reverse-strand DNA letters on linear map
sequence.hide_backbone_when_letters_visi: Hide DNA backbone line when letters are shown
sequence.keep_helical_parallel: Keep helical strands parallel (same slant direction)
sequence.enable_compressed_letters: Enable compressed DNA letters in Auto routing mode
